anomalies.description: SP entry at term 7 contains 20+ course titles concatenated into a single string (~1122 characters, 4 CU). The remaining 8 SP entries are clean.
anomalies.detection_method: SP entry title length inspection (>500 characters detected)
anomalies.source_side: extraction-side: parser merged multi-column/multi-row table section into one field
anomalies.atlas_handling: Suppress SP display entirely for MATSPED. AoS payload is intact and usable.
anomalies.notes: Source PDF has non-standard table layout. Worth preserving if reporting back to WGU.

anomalies.description: One SP entry contains concatenated course titles (147 characters: 'Organizational Behavior Fundamentals for Success in Business Information Technology Management Essentials Managing in a Global Business Environment'). The SP spans 35 entries across 10 terms.
anomalies.detection_method: SP entry title length inspection (>100 characters)
anomalies.atlas_handling: Suppress the single bad entry; use remaining 34 SP entries. SP is otherwise usable.
anomalies.notes: 147-char title is below the 150-char anomaly threshold for Category D. Classified as A with one suppressed entry. Verify against source PDF.

anomalies.description: SP blends bachelor's-level and master's-level content in a single term sequence (30 courses, 10+ terms). Program is an accelerated B.S./M.S. pathway, not a standard single-level program.
anomalies.detection_method: Term span inspection; program name 'UG' accelerated bridge designation
anomalies.source_side: structural: program design spans two degree levels
anomalies.atlas_handling: Display SP with label: 'Accelerated B.S./M.S. pathway — term sequence spans both degree levels.' Do not suppress.
anomalies.notes: MSCSUG is in LAB_EXCLUSIONS for the Compare tool for unrelated reasons.

anomalies.description: Cert extractor matched substrings of words containing '-aws' (laws, draws, flaws, etc.) as AWS cert references. ~51 false positive mentions across ~20 programs.
anomalies.detection_method: Frequency analysis: all false positives start with lowercase 'aws ' (not uppercase AWS)
anomalies.source_side: extraction-side: regex was case-insensitive and matched substrings
anomalies.atlas_handling: Suppression rule applied in extract_cert_mapping.py: matches /^aws [a-z]/ and not starts with 'AWS' are suppressed.
anomalies.notes: 51 instances suppressed in Phase 1 extraction. Not a guide authoring issue.

anomalies.description: String 'for this course and there is no specific technical knowledge needed' appears 35 times as extracted prereq. 'for this course' appears 80 times. 'to this course' appears 15 times. Combined false positive pool: 135 mentions.
anomalies.source_side: extraction-side: extractor matched 'prerequisite' and captured trailing fragment without checking negation context
anomalies.atlas_handling: Exact string suppression applied first in extract_prereq_relationships.py before any other processing.
anomalies.notes: 135 false positives suppressed in Phase 2 extraction.

anomalies.description: version, pub_date, page_count are null or zero. Content fully intact.
anomalies.source_side: source-side: older guide format with no footer pagination/version block
anomalies.atlas_handling: Surface AoS and SP content normally. Omit guide provenance badge or show 'version not available'.

anomalies.description: Capstone field captures only the first of three capstone courses. Multi-capstone structural format not handled by current parser.
anomalies.detection_method: Session 23 notes; confirmed in manifest validation
anomalies.source_side: structural: multi-capstone program design not handled by parser
anomalies.atlas_handling: Display captured capstone with partial: true flag. Suppress if displaying incomplete list would mislead.

anomalies.description: 'Praxis exam,' (with trailing comma) appears in BAESSESC, BAESSESP, ENDSESC, ENDSESP instead of 'Praxis exam'.
anomalies.source_side: extraction-side: extractor captured the comma that follows the cert mention in the sentence
anomalies.atlas_handling: Trailing punctuation stripping applied before whitelist match in extract_cert_mapping.py. Normalized to 'Praxis exam'.

anomalies.description: MSRNNUED, MSRNNULM, MSRNNUNI degree titles are truncated in parsed output (cosmetic). MSCSAIML degree_title also truncated. MACCM Corporate Financial Analysis: title/first-sentence quality issue.
anomalies.source_side: source-side: long degree titles in PDF exceed parser extraction boundary
anomalies.atlas_handling: Cosmetic issue only. Use canonical degree title from catalog rather than guide-extracted degree_title for display.
anomalies.notes: Does not affect AoS or SP content. Content intact for all affected programs.
